meta.notes: Round 2 re-run (correct methodology). Each test case ran as a separate exec call so llm_overhead is properly measured as agent thinking time between steps (46.8s, 16.5%). All 3 runs had LLM JSON truncation on pass 2 but auto-repaired successfully. T1 Instagram fetch slowest (31.7s, Apify). T2 X fetch fastest (1.5s, RapidAPI). T3 TikTok (6.4s, Apify). LLM analysis consistent at 62-70s/account (2-pass Anthropic calls). system_prompt_tokens is first-turn cacheRead (includes system prompt + prior conversation context).

task.expected_output: JSON with profile metrics, engagement analysis, and growth recommendations per account
